name: Expansion AI
description: Adds survivor AI units with team behavior, patrols, combat, recruitment, and faction systems.
overview:
DayZ Expansion AI is the direct follow-up of the discontinued EnfusionAI mod. It introduces survivor AI to the game with advanced behavioral capabilities.

## Key Features

- **Team Behavior** — AI can behave as a team and follow a team leader
- **12 Formation Groups** — Different tactical formations for AI squads
- **Advanced Movement** — AI can vault over objects and open doors
- **Vehicle Passengers** — AI can sit as passengers in vehicles
- **Patrol Waypoints** — AI can follow waypoints (patrols)
- **Long-Range Combat** — Engage in fights up to 1000m based on distance, line of sight, weapon type, ammo type, and configured accuracy
- **Taunting** — AI can taunt their victims
- **Recruitment** — AI can be recruited by players
- **Equipment Usage** — AI can use flashlights and night vision
- **Safezone Guards** — AI guards to protect safezones
- **AI Factions** — Faction system for organizing AI groups

### Integration with Other Mods

- Combined with **Expansion Market**: AI Trader NPCs
- Combined with **Expansion Quests**: AI Quest NPCs
installation: Ensure Expansion Core is installed and loaded.
Place the @ExpansionAI folder in your server's root directory.
Start the server to generate AI configuration files.
Configure patrol routes and AI behavior in the generated settings files.

troubleshooting.solution: Check that Enabled is set to 1, verify patrol files are valid JSON, and ensure MaxAI limit hasn't been reached.
Lower AccuracyMax to 0.4-0.5 for more balanced engagements.
Reduce MaxAI count and increase MinDistanceToPlayer to reduce active AI density.

useCases.title: Military Base Guards
useCases.description: Set up stationary AI guards at military locations with military-grade loadouts. Use STATIONARY behavior with a small patrol radius.

useCases.title: Roaming Bandit Patrols
useCases.description: Create hostile AI patrols along roads and key routes. Use PATROL behavior with waypoints along major roads.

useCases.title: Town Defense
useCases.description: Place friendly AI in towns to protect players from zombies and hostile AI.

quickSettings.name: Enabled
quickSettings.description: Master switch to enable or disable AI spawning.

quickSettings.name: MaxAI
quickSettings.description: Maximum number of AI units that can exist simultaneously.

quickSettings.name: DespawnTime
quickSettings.description: Time in seconds before an AI unit despawns after losing aggro.

quickSettings.name: MinDistanceToPlayer
quickSettings.description: Minimum spawn distance from players in meters.

quickSettings.name: MaxDistanceToPlayer
quickSettings.description: Maximum spawn distance from players in meters.

useCases.title: Roaming Bandit Patrols

useCases.title: Town Defense

DayZ Expansion AI is the direct follow-up of the discontinued EnfusionAI mod. It introduces survivor AI to the game with advanced behavioral capabilities.

## Key Features

- **Team Behavior** — AI can behave as a team and follow a team leader
- **12 Formation Groups** — Different tactical formations for AI squads
- **Advanced Movement** — AI can vault over objects and open doors
- **Vehicle Passengers** — AI can sit as passengers in vehicles
- **Patrol Waypoints** — AI can follow waypoints (patrols)
- **Long-Range Combat** — Engage in fights up to 1000m based on distance, line of sight, weapon type, ammo type, and configured accuracy
- **Taunting** — AI can taunt their victims
- **Recruitment** — AI can be recruited by players
- **Equipment Usage** — AI can use flashlights and night vision
- **Safezone Guards** — AI guards to protect safezones
- **AI Factions** — Faction system for organizing AI groups

### Integration with Other Mods

steps: Ensure Expansion Core is installed and loaded.
Place the @ExpansionAI folder in your server's root directory.
Start the server to generate AI configuration files.
Configure patrol routes and AI behavior in the generated settings files.

useCases.title: AI not spawning
useCases.description: Check that Enabled is set to 1, verify patrol files are valid JSON, and ensure MaxAI limit hasn't been reached.

useCases.title: AI are too accurate
useCases.description: Lower AccuracyMax to 0.4-0.5 for more balanced engagements.

useCases.title: Server performance issues with AI
useCases.description: Reduce MaxAI count and increase MinDistanceToPlayer to reduce active AI density.
